'''Linuri''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Doldur sector/Legends|Doldur sector]] with a diverse ecosystem. Most of the planet's regions could support [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] life.

==History==
During [[Thrawn campaign]], the planet was home to an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] base commanded by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis's]] forces [[Raid on Linuri|attacked]] the planet, the last of their encounters with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] before the [[Raid on New Cov|raid]] on [[New Cov/Legends|New Cov]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
